title: Project Moon Music Discs
description: Adds music discs with songs from the project moon games.
body:
# ✨ Project Moon Music Discs ! ✨

[![Available for NeoForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9ae07fbc26c08220b4856cb244f86904d0c172c.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-moon-music-discs/versions?l=neoforge)
[![Available for Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513035d1231a86dff137c74e04a5e64633593f10.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-moon-music-discs/versions?l=fabric)
[![Requires Fabric API!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c259d3aef3e3f827961844368078d1e91281fcc4.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
> If you are on fabric, this does require the Fabric API.....
Version 2 Release Notes

- im too lazy to do the advancements and loottables
- in other news tian tian, saikai, Middle Neighbour Toujou, Fly, My wings, in hell we live lament and between two worlds got added
